description: Use this API to get zone real extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr, rval = get_ext_zone_real(izone, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension zone field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘RVAL’ not returned.
Unknown error with data access; ‘RVAL’ not returned.
API Prereqs not met; ‘RVAL’ not returned.
